projects.title: Knowledge Graph Multi-Agent Chat Assistant
projects.description: Enterprise chat assistant integrating knowledge graphs, retrieval workflows, and multi-agent orchestration for domain-specific question answering and task execution.
projects.homeDescription: Multi-agent assistant architecture for enterprise knowledge access and intelligent task routing.

projects.title: Streaming Voice Conversational AI
projects.description: Real-time voice AI system supporting low-latency streaming conversations, speech interaction pipelines, and production-grade conversational experiences.
projects.homeDescription: Low-latency streaming voice stack for real-time conversational AI applications.

projects.title: Omnichannel Customer Service AI
projects.description: Omnichannel AI solution for customer service systems, designed to unify interactions across channels and improve automation in enterprise support workflows.
projects.homeDescription: AI-driven omnichannel service layer for scalable customer support operations.

projects.title: Smart Video Processor & Highlight Extractor
projects.description: Video intelligence pipeline for processing media assets and extracting highlights automatically for content workflows and production use cases.
projects.homeDescription: Multimodal video pipeline for automated highlight extraction and smart media processing.

projects.title: AI Faceswap for Film Production
projects.description: AI faceswap application built for media production, supporting character transformation workflows in commercial video projects.
projects.homeDescription: Production-focused faceswap workflow for media and entertainment projects.

projects.title: AI Kiosk Applications
projects.description: Interactive AI applications for kiosk systems deployed in banking and event environments, focused on user interaction and service automation.
projects.homeDescription: Applied AI interfaces for kiosk systems in finance and event deployments.

projects.title: LLM Privacy Policy Analysis
projects.description: LLM-based system for analyzing privacy policies and supporting compliance-oriented interpretation of personal data processing practices.
projects.homeDescription: LLM workflow for privacy policy analysis and compliance-oriented document understanding.

projects.title: Medical Image Captioning
projects.description: Multimodal AI application for generating captions from medical images to support healthcare-oriented interpretation and downstream workflows.
projects.homeDescription: Medical image captioning pipeline for healthcare and multimodal AI use cases.

projects.title: Smart E-commerce Recommender System
projects.description: Recommendation system project for smart e-commerce scenarios, developed while leading a 17-member team during OJT at FPT Software Academy.
projects.homeDescription: Recommender system for smart e-commerce built with team leadership experience.

projects.title: SmartGIS and Call Center Platforms
projects.description: Platform development spanning GIS features, map layers, area measurement, urban planning visualization, and WebRTC/VoIP call center systems.
projects.homeDescription: Fullstack platform work across GIS systems, mapping layers, and real-time communication.
